body:
## Summary

Adds the official **Dealix Commercial Launch OS** with first 5 verticals, SAR offer ladder, 400+ daily founder-review draft factory, quality/compliance gates, no-send safety audit, commercial metrics, delivery playbooks, GitHub Action, tests, and final readiness report.

**This system generates review-only drafts. It does not send external messages.** AI generates and ranks drafts only; the founder reviews and approves; all external actions are manual.

## First 5 Verticals
- Facilities Management & Maintenance
- Contracting & Project Controls
- Real Estate & Property Operations
- Legal & Professional Services (privacy-first / sensitive)
- Consulting, Training & B2B Services

## What's included
- `config/commercial_*.json` (10) — data source of truth (verticals, offers, channels, gates, distribution, risk terms, metrics)
- `scripts/commercial_*.py` (10) — generator (400+/day), quality gate, compliance gate, scoring, founder review report, metrics summary, seed-lead validator, **safety audit**, **launch readiness**, shared core
- `data/commercial_seed_leads.example.jsonl` — non-PII example leads + validator (rejects scraping sources, missing consent)
- `docs/commercial-launch/**` — 5 deep vertical playbooks + ~22 docs (offer ladder, pricing, positioning AR/EN, sales narrative, channel policy, founder daily playbook, sales assets, delivery OS, metrics dashboard, external go-live requirements, final readiness report)
- `tests/test_commercial_*.py` (9) — **30 passing**
- `.github/workflows/commercial-draft-factory.yml` — daily `schedule` + `workflow_dispatch`, `permissions: contents: read`, no secrets, **artifact-only** upload
- `README.md` — corrected clone URL (`https://github.com/Dealix-sa/dealix.git`) + Commercial Launch OS section
- `.gitignore` — ignores daily `outputs/commercial_launch/` artifacts (never committed)

## Safety Guarantees
- No SMTP · No WhatsApp sending · No LinkedIn automation · No website auto-submit · No scraping · No secrets
- Every draft: `send_allowed=false`, `external_send_blocked=true`, `requires_founder_approval=true`, `no_auto_send=true`
- Context-aware safety audit (flags executable send code & unsafe flags, not policy prose) — **0 violations across 65 files**

## Tests Run (this environment)
- `pytest --noconftest` on the 9 commercial test files → **30 passed**
- `ruff check` (new files) → **PASS**
- `black --check --target-version py311` (new files) → **PASS**
- `python scripts/commercial_generate_400_drafts.py --target 400` → 400 drafts, target met
- `python scripts/commercial_safety_audit.py` → **pass: true**, 0 violations
- `python scripts/commercial_launch_readiness.py` → **verdict: GO**
- `make security-smoke` → fails only on **pre-existing** fixtures (`sk_live_`/`ghp_` test strings in unrelated files); **no new file flagged**
- `make env-check` / `make test` not run here (full deps/network unavailable); commercial scripts are stdlib-only and run standalone.

## Go / No-Go
**GO:** draft generation · founder review · manual review · paid diagnostics · discovery calls · proposals · pilot planning · metrics.
**NO-GO:** automated sending · WhatsApp cold outreach · LinkedIn automation · bulk email · auto-submit forms · guaranteed-ROI claims · sensitive data before agreement · any external sending from GitHub Actions.

## Remaining External Work (manual, outside repo)
SPF/DKIM/DMARC · Google Postmaster · domain reputation monitoring · manual suppression process · CRM/manual sending process · Calendly/payment/checkout · privacy/Terms/DPA/PDPL review. See `docs/commercial-launch/21_EXTERNAL_GO_LIVE_REQUIREMENTS.md`.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EUEpC3vGyfdKS6mUwR9B6W

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01EUEpC3vGyfdKS6mUwR9B6W)_

commits.messageBody:
…afts

Adds the Dealix Official Commercial Launch OS — a review-only commercial
operating system for the first 5 GCC B2B verticals. AI generates and ranks
drafts only; the founder reviews and approves. Nothing is sent.

- 5 vertical playbooks + SAR offer ladder, pricing, positioning, sales narrative
- Daily Draft Factory: 400+ ranked founder-review drafts (cold email/follow-up/
  LinkedIn manual/website form), all with safe flags (send_allowed=false,
  external_send_blocked=true, requires_founder_approval=true, no_auto_send=true)
- Quality gate, compliance gate, scoring, founder review report, metrics summary
- No-external-send safety audit + launch readiness checker
- Channel policy, founder daily playbook, delivery OS, retention/expansion
- 10 config files, example seed leads + validator
- 9 tests (30 passing), artifact-only GitHub Action (read-only perms, no secrets)
- README: corrected clone URL + Commercial Launch OS section

Safety: no SMTP, no WhatsApp cold outreach, no LinkedIn automation, no
auto-submit, no scraping, no secrets.
